author: Kevin, CA
text: I had a very lovely experience getting fitted and choosing a nice set of frames for glasses. They offer a great selection including designer brand names. Doris is friendly and extremely knowledgeable about finding the right pair. The process was smooth and I am happy with the product.

author: Paulette Taylor
text: The store representative greeted my sons and me with a big grin and was quite kind. The environment was bright and very clean. She tried her best to make accommodations for us. The care and service were excellent.

author: Bizzy D
text: Posh Optical is probably the best place I have ever dealt with when it comes to glasses and testing. The staff went above and beyond in helping me find the perfect glasses. They were patient and did not rush the process.
